Metadata.title: Your Name — Python Backend Developer
Metadata.description: A backend developer portfolio focused on Python, APIs, databases, and web systems.

Hero.description: I build clean APIs, learn database systems, and turn ideas into usable backend applications.

About.title: I am interested in the processes working behind the scenes.
About.description1: My learning focus is Python and backend development: how requests are processed, validated, stored, and returned through APIs.
About.description2: This website uses Next.js as the portfolio interface, while my projects continue to highlight backend engineering skills.

Skills.title: Technologies I currently use and learn.
Skills.description: This list is intentionally honest and easy to update. Remove technologies you have never used.

Projects.title: Backend projects that explain how I think.
Projects.description: Each case study includes the problem, solution, features, and lessons learned—not just a technology list.

Journey.title: Learn step by step, then build something.
Journey.pythonText: Syntax, functions, OOP, error handling, and virtual environments.
Journey.databaseText: Table relationships, queries, constraints, migrations, and schema design.
Journey.apiText: Routing, validation, authentication, documentation, and testing.
Journey.deploymentText: Docker, environment variables, logging, and running applications online.

Contact.title: Have a project or want to discuss backend development?
Contact.description: This form opens the email application on your device. Later, you can replace it with your own FastAPI backend.
Contact.name: Name
Contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your project or message...

Footer.built: Built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Motion.
